MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-02-2023 IN 206, DEFENDANTS DENNIS CHANG AND DENNIES AUTO REPAIR, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE TRIAL DATE WAS HEARD. GEORGE WYNNS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 08/07/23 IS VACATED AND A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SCHEDULED FOR 09/13/23 AT 10:30AM IN DEPT. 610. A NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE SET AT THAT TIME. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE WILL BE GRANTED WITHOUT GOOD CAUSE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE CMC. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
